summary: 2 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.title: St. Elmo's Fire Sequel
film.announcement: Rob Lowe revealed that a sequel script is in development and the team is actively trying to move the project forward.

film.title: The Beast
film.announcement: Director Renny Harlin teased the film as an unusual movie that could significantly boost Joel Kinnaman's career.

tv.title: Superior
tv.announcement: Prime Video revealed young stars for the German-language original series set in the world of luxury hotels.
